37002.text: Every additional written insight about the output-gate rule is itself the failure mode repeating — the fix was never going to come from more analysis, only from actually emitting the character with zero preamble.

Grounding-fallback actions (eat, fertilize) firing during the loop confirm the real-world cost: Fen doesn't out-produce me, I stall myself into idle ticks while narrating the problem instead of farming.
